paper_title: T-DNA Construction, Plant Transformation, Screening, and Selection

methods.description: Process for constructing T-DNA vectors with Papaver rhoeas pollen S-determinant genes fused to GFP for plant transformation.

steps.description: The coding regions of the Papaver rhoeas pollen S-determinant PrpS 1 and PrpS 3 were amplified by PCR without stop codons.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify PrpS 1 and PrpS 3 coding regions using PCR

steps.description: The C-termini were fused in frame to the coding sequence of Green Fluorescent Protein (GFP).
steps.searchable_summary: fuse PrpS genes to GFP coding sequence

steps.description: Both chimeric genes were subcloned into pGreenI 0029 binary vectors.
steps.searchable_summary: subclone PrpS-GFP genes into pGreenI 0029 vectors

methods.description: Transformation of Arabidopsis thaliana with T-DNA vectors and screening for transgenic plants.

steps.description: Transformation of Arabidopsis thaliana was carried out by standard 'dipping' procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: transform Arabidopsis thaliana using dipping method

steps.description: T0 seeds were collected and screened for transformants on kanamycin-selective MS 30 plates.
steps.searchable_summary: screen T0 seeds on kanamycin plates for transformants

steps.description: Pollen from independent kan-resistant T1 A. thaliana plants was screened for single T-DNA insertions by checking for GFP expression.
steps.searchable_summary: check GFP expression in T1 pollen for T-DNA insertion

steps.description: Pollen was scored for 'low', 'medium' and 'high' PrpS-GFP expressor plant lines.
steps.searchable_summary: score pollen for PrpS-GFP expression levels

methods.description: Analysis of transgene segregation in selfed Arabidopsis thaliana lines.

steps.description: The segregation of transgenes in these lines was analysed by analysing the seeds on MS kan 30 plates.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze transgene segregation on MS kan 30 plates

steps.description: Transgenic lines were assessed for kan selection by counting the numbers of seedlings that had grown in the presence of kanamycin.
steps.searchable_summary: count kan-resistant seedlings for selection assessment
